name: rad-brainstormer
description: Brainstorming in Claude Code with an optional local visual companion. Mockups, diagrams, and side-by-side comparisons render in a browser tab when the next question benefits from them — entirely local (no npm deps; Node stdlib only), terminal-vs-browser routing decided per question. Methodology skills cover SCAMPER, Six Hats, 5 Whys, How Might We, reverse brainstorming, creative unblock, idea generation, idea evaluation, and a design-sprint flow. Three agents handle domain research, idea challenging, and spec review.
